title: Trains of Ruun: Community Addon
description: Additional Trains of Ruun content from the community =)
body:
Trains of Ruun: Community Addon requires Immersive Railroading and Trains of Ruun to properly operate

TRAINS OF RUUN: COMMUNITY ADDON

This pack contains custom community made liveries. If you would like to contribute, join our discord below. We also hold livery contests with rewards Discord

CONTENTS

Altara Rail by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia x2 - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car - Boxcar Army by Bella - Boxcar - Tank Car Aswan Southern by Colonel McShizzel - 2-4-2 Nattie Avoris by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Boxcar - Tank Car x3 Ben & Sons by Railraider - Boxcar - Reefer BioFuel by Bella - Tank Car Blackthorne by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Boxcar Brazoil by Aunuli - 2-4-2 Nattie - Tank Car - Caboose Canadian by Colonel McShizzel - 2-8-0 Adaylia x2 - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car - Observation Car Central Union by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia C.G.R. by Connie - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia Circus by Colonel McShizzel - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Bobber Caboose - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Boxcar x2 - Reefer - Livestock Car x3 - Flat / Gondola x3 Clam by Bella - Tank Car Classic by Bella - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car Comet by Colonel McShizzel - 2-8-0 Adaylia Cortral by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie x2 - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Rotary Snowplow - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car Darkez International by Laura Darkez - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car - Observation Car Erilon by Peter Kitsuné - 0-4-0 Steph - 2-4-2 Nattie x4 - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car - Boxcar x2 - Tank Car Federal Reserve by Colonel McShizzel - Boxcar Forge Wolf by Bella - Boxcar x2 Frigit by Bella - Reefer Hokkaido by Colonel McShizzel - 0-4-0 Steph - 2-8-0 Adaylia Idea by Bella - Boxcar Immersive Engineering by Colonel McShizzel - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car - Observation Car Iron Lake by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia x3 Learian National by AshR - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car Mars by Colonel McShizzel - 2-8-0 Adaylia Maine & Rafferty by Colonel McShizzel - 2-4-2 Nattie x3 - 2-8-0 Adaylia x2 - Bobber Caboose x2 - Baggage Car x2 - Combine Car x2 - Coach Car x2 - Observation Car x2 - Boxcar x4 - Reefer x2 - Livestock Car x2 - Tank Car x3 Montburgh by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia - Boxcar x2 - Tank Car Mount Thunderpeak Mythril Mines - 0-4-0 Steph - Flat / Gondola x2 Nuril & Thuun by Peter Kitsuné - 2-4-2 Nattie - Baggage Car - Combine Car - Coach Car Nyx & North Western by Peter Kitsuné - 2-4-2 Nattie Octan by Colonel McShizzel - Tank Car O'Flynn Logging by Colonel McShizzel - 2-4-2 Nattie Rosenholm by Bella - 2-4-2 Nattie - 2-8-0 Adaylia SYNX by Bella - Boxcar - Reefer - Tank Car x2 UNU by Bella - Boxcar x2 - Tank Car x2 Wave by Colonel McShizzel - Tank Car

NOTES

This pack is an addon to the base Trains of Ruun. It will not work without Trains of Ruun! This pack is a community collaboration so updates come about as people make content for the pack. Usage and redistribution in any form is allowed, just please credit the livery authors and link back here in some form =) Curseforge Discord Patreon Iron Horse Dev Group
